news.headline: Toll Brothers is selling final homes in The Meadows, Lake Forest, CA - a master-planned community in Orange County.
news.summary: The remaining homes in a well-equipped master-planned community located in Orange County are being swiftly bought by interested buyers. This community offers a range of amenities and is situated in a prime location within Orange County. With only a few homes left, these properties are in high demand and are selling fast. Don't miss out on this opportunity to own a home in this sought-after community in Orange County. Contact us for more information before it's too late.

news.headline: Jordan Murphy appointed Director of Wrestling & Head of Academy Wrestling at The St. James in Springfield, VA. Former NCAA All-American takes on new roles.
news.summary: The St. James Performance Academy in Springfield, Virginia, has appointed Jordan Murphy as the new Director of Grassroots Wrestling and Head of Academy Wrestling on April 3, 2025. Murphy, a former NCAA All-American, is known for his success in building acclaimed wrestling programs. This announcement marks a significant development for the academy's wrestling division, emphasizing their commitment to growing and developing young talent in the sport.

news.headline: Get ready for the Nintendo Switch 2 in June with new games like Mario Kart World. Full rundown on release date and price coming soon!
news.summary: In June, Nintendo will be releasing the highly anticipated Nintendo Switch 2, which will come bundled with popular titles like Mario Kart World. This second version of the Nintendo Switch is set to make a big splash in the gaming world with its enhanced features and advancements. Fans can look forward to enjoying an array of new and exciting games on this upgraded console. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting release!

news.headline: NMTCs allocate $19.5 M to Potters Industries in Wilson, NC, aiding job creation and production revival.
news.summary: In Forest City, Iowa on April 3, 2025, Rural Development Partners (RDP) provided Potters Industries, LLC with $19.5 million in New Markets Tax Credit (NMTC) funding. Potters Industries is renowned for producing glass beads used in retroreflective highway safety items. This investment aims to boost the rural community and enhance safety measures on the roads.

news.headline: Loar Holdings rises in ratings, SmartSelect Composite Rating jumps from 94 to 98, making it stand out.
news.summary: Loar Holdings experienced a rise in its IBD SmartSelect Composite Rating on Thursday, climbing from 94 to 98. The Young Loar stock surged to the forefront of high-performing stocks and received a notable rating upgrade.

news.headline: Spotify announces new initiatives to increase advertising revenue, receives positive feedback from stock analysts.
news.summary: Spotify Technology, a popular music and podcast streaming platform, has revealed new strategies aimed at increasing its advertising income. Industry analysts have expressed optimism about the move. The company is making a concerted effort to enhance its advertising revenue through the introduction of innovative tools and partnerships. This development has garnered a positive response from Spotify stock analysts who view it as a step in the right direction for the company.

news.headline: Stocks of Meta, Snap, Reddit, and Pinterest drop over tariff concerns impacting digital advertising spending.
news.summary: Stock prices of Meta and other social media companies experienced a decline on Thursday due to worries that tariffs could deter expenditure on digital advertising. Meta, Snap, Reddit, and Pinterest all saw a slide as tariffs were seen to contribute to the 'Digital Ads Volatility'. This news was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Global stock markets fell due to U.S. tariffs, except for one that rose on Thursday - not specified.
news.summary: Global markets experienced a widespread downturn due to U.S. tariffs impacting the global economy, including a noticeable sell-off in the U.S. stock market. However, there were a few exceptions to this trend, with some markets recording an increase. Notably, only one major world stock market saw positive movements on Thursday amidst this broader decline.

news.headline: US lawmakers move forward on anti-CBDC bill with 27-22 vote. 114 cosponsors, aiming to bar federal issuance of digital currencies.
news.summary: The US House Financial Services Committee approved the CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act with a 27-22 vote, one of five bills discussed in a recent session. Representative Tom Emmer, the bill's sponsor, highlighted its previous support with a 216-192 vote last Congress and currently boasting 114 cosponsors. The bill aims to prevent federal banks from engaging with CBDCs, reflecting concerns over financial privacy issues. Additionally, Republican lawmakers, including Senator Ted Cruz, are showing bipartisan support for preventing the development of CBDCs, echoing sentiments from the Trump administration. While the bill's journey to becoming law remains uncertain, it signals a growing opposition to CBDCs within political circles and industry leaders.

news.headline: Technology companies are impacted by Trump's tariff policies, causing concern among smartphone and hardware manufacturers.
Joe Jackson and crew will row nonstop for 157 miles on Rogue River to raise funds for son battling Duchenne muscular dystrophy.
news.summary: In Medford, Oregon, a group led by Joe Jackson, along with Jeremy Leever and Shaun Olson, will undertake a challenging endeavor on April 25th. They will row nonstop overnight for 157 miles along the Rogue River. This initiative aims to raise awareness and essential funds for Joe's son, William Jackson, who is fighting Duchenne muscular dystrophy (DMD). The usual 10-day journey will be compressed into one intense push, highlighting the critical need for a cure for DMD.

news.headline: Ex-employee claims getting $5,000 in ETH monthly to spy for rival against Rippling.
news.summary: An ex-worker at Rippling claimed that he was paid $5,000 worth of ETH monthly to gather information on the company for rival Deel.

news.headline: T.W. Garner recalls Texas Pete® Habanero Buffalo Sauce for undeclared sulfites & mislabeled CHAbanero Sauce in NC.
news.summary: In Winston Salem, North Carolina, on April 3, 2025, T.W. Garner Food Company announced a recall of specific lots and sizes of Texas Pete® Habanero Buffalo Sauce due to a packaging error that included Sriracha Sauce in some bottles. The Sriracha Sauce contains sulfites, which are not listed on the label. Consumers are advised to check the table below for affected products. It is crucial to be aware of this issue and take necessary precautions.

news.headline: New docuseries "Cancel Nation" to explore cultural fault lines in America, examines impact of cancel culture on individuals.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on April 3, 2025, a new docuseries called "Cancel Nation" is exploring the repercussions of standing up for one's beliefs in the face of public scrutiny. The series delves into the consequences of personal sacrifice in the age of cancel culture, where a single viewpoint can lead to widespread backlash. By shedding light on the cultural divisions of today, "Cancel Nation" challenges viewers to consider the price of taking a stance in a society where personal struggles are often turned into public entertainment. This thought-provoking series aims to spark conversations about the complexities of modern values and the power of social influence. Stay tuned to witness the exploration of these timely themes in the rapidly evolving landscape of social media and public opinion.

news.headline: SAFE, an AI-powered cyber risk management firm, recognized as a leader by Liminal for exceptional product capability.
news.summary: SAFE, a renowned company based in Palo Alto, California, was recently recognized for its exceptional product capability, AI-powered automation, and high practitioner satisfaction. On April 3, 2025, the company announced that it has been named a "Leader" in the 2025 assessment. This recognition highlights SAFE's prominent position in the industry and its commitment to innovation. The acknowledgment underscores the company's dedication to providing top-notch services and solutions in the field of AI-powered continuous cyber risk management.

news.headline: S4 Capital's Monks Technology Services and Tagboard partner to innovate broadcast infrastructure.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Monks, a digital brand of S4 Capital plc, and Tagboard, a provider of interactive graphics for live events, have formed a strategic partnership. Monks, known for its data-driven approach, will collaborate with Tagboard to revolutionize live events and broadcasting by integrating their modern graphics systems. This partnership represents a significant step in the evolution of the industry, as both companies combine their expertise to enhance the overall viewer experience.

news.headline: Lost collaboration between Andy Warhol and Broadway revealed by ad man David Bartels in a new video profile.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in New York, a unique piece of advertising and pop culture history was revealed. In a recent video feature by Retriever, seasoned advertising professional David Bartels shared the tale of an undiscovered joint project with a renowned artist, set in Broadway. This collaboration, which had never been seen before, offers a glimpse into a bygone era of creativity and innovation.

news.headline: Richmond American Homes to open SummerTide community in Palm Coast on April 10, 2025. Exciting new development.
news.summary: In Palm Coast, Florida, the Grand Opening of SummerTide by Richmond American Homes of Florida, LP, a subsidiary of M.D.C. Holdings, Inc., is scheduled for April 10, 2025. The new community can be explored at RichmondAmerican.com/SummerTide.

news.headline: Pawfit trackers promote healthy pet routines, article addresses benefits of morning family routines.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Los Angeles and Liverpool, England, dogs are celebrating the arrival of spring. With the changing season, it's a great time to shake up our routines. Consider incorporating morning family time, regular cleaning habits, and exercise into your daily schedule. Embracing these changes can bring numerous benefits to both humans and their furry companions.

news.headline: Analyst warns of potential S&P 500 and Bitcoin downturn, as historical trends may lead to further decline in April.
news.summary: Analysts are predicting a continued decline for the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY) and Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) due to technical indicators and macro-economic factors. Renowned analyst Benjamin Cowen cautioned in a recent podcast that the S&P 500's drop could persist until April, resembling previous market downturns affecting both stocks and cryptocurrencies. While historically March has been a turning point during corrections like the financial crisis and pandemic crash, Cowen suggests that downturns could extend into April. Of note is mid-April, when the next inflation data will be released, carrying the spotlight due to new tariffs and keeping investors on edge. This information is detailed on Benzinga.com for further insights.

news.headline: Intel and TSMC tentatively agree to form a chipmaking joint venture, and reached a preliminary agreement to form a joint venture with TSMC, taking a 20% stake in the new company - The Information. $INTC
Data Center World boosts program with investment experts to share market insights amid booming $151 billion data center market.
news.summary: In San Francisco, the data center market is experiencing significant growth and is projected to hit $151 billion by 2029, as reported by Omdia. With this surge in mind, Data Center World, known as the top worldwide conference for data center IT infrastructure, mission-critical facilities management, power advancements, emerging construction techniques, and AI-powered technologies, has enhanced its program with renowned investment specialists to equip investors with crucial market intelligence.

news.headline: Brent Crude futures settle at $70.14/bbl, down $4.81, 6.42%
US money-market assets rise to record $7.03 trillion at ICI.
Citi and Bank of America face biggest rout since regional bank crisis.
New US tariffs crippling small businesses nationwide, leading to growing concerns among owners.
news.summary: Flex Assembly Systems Inc revealed today that small businesses are being squeezed by the recently imposed US tariffs. Small business owners nationwide are increasingly worried about the negative impacts of these tariffs, which have resulted in rising concerns.

news.headline: White House annex now shows tariff on South Korea at 25%.
Solana's SOL price drops 12.75% to $112.50 in 24 hours due to Trump tariffs, negative futures basis and funding rates, and technical factors.
news.summary: Solana's native token, SOL, has experienced a significant drop of almost 12.75% in the past 24 hours, hitting a three-week low of $112.50 on April 3. This decline can be attributed to various factors, including the latest round of tariffs imposed by the Trump administration, negative futures basis and funding rates, and several technical factors. The drop in SOL's price is connected to fading demand in its futures market, as seen in the decreasing annualized rolling basis on three-month contracts. Additionally, SOL's funding rates have turned negative, indicating a weakening bullish momentum in the market. The current trend suggests a bearish continuation pattern for SOL, with the possibility of prices declining further to $96.

news.headline: Kateryna Odarchenko leads IGAPA at the 10th International Forum in Washington, D.C., hosted by Bay Atlantic University.
news.summary: A high-profile event, the 10th International Government Relations Forum, took place on March 27 in Washington, DC. This significant gathering brought together policymakers, business figures, and advocacy specialists. Hosted by Bay Atlantic University in collaboration with other organizations, the forum attracted a notable attendance, including over 500 participants. This event provided a platform for fruitful discussions on global government relations and crucial policy issues, underscoring its importance in fostering dialogue and cooperation between various stakeholders.

news.headline: Top furniture retailer RH's market cap drops 40% post-tariff introduction.
Kaldalón hf. AGM held on April 3, 2025, at Reykjavík Natura. Key resolutions proposed at the meeting.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, the Annual General Meeting of Kaldalón hf. took place at Reykjavík Natura, located at Nauthólsvegur 52 in Reykjavík. Various proposals were put forward during the meeting.

news.headline: FTC: Tariffs should not be used as a green light for price fixing.
Corner Bakery Cafe is celebrating 34 years by giving away Smiley Mugs on April 10, with free coffee and Funfetti treats.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, in Dallas, Corner Bakery Cafe® is celebrating its 34th anniversary by reintroducing a beloved tradition with a special one-day Smiley Mug Giveaway on April 10. This limited-time event promises to bring joy to customers, as they mark the occasion alongside the brand.

news.headline: Vagaro report: Barber & beauty industries to grow faster than most. Employment projected to increase by 7% by 2033.
news.summary: In San Francisco, the beauty and barber industries are on the rise as per a recent report by Vagaro, a top software provider for beauty, wellness, and fitness businesses. The report, named Vantage Report, highlights the industries' growth fueled by changing trends, digital advancements, and shifting consumer habits. Data from the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics indicates that jobs for barbers, hairstylists, and cosmetologists are set to increase by 7% by 2033, surpassing the average growth rate. This surge in employment opportunities signifies a promising future for professionals in these sectors.

news.headline: The FTC is to make sure that American companies are competing on prices.
Legrand reveals 2025-2027 CSR Roadmap, reaffirming commitment to sustainability and innovation in North America.
news.summary: On April 3, 2025, Legrand®, a renowned company in electrical and digital building infrastructures based in West Hartford, Connecticut, revealed its latest Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) Roadmap. This marks the sixth consecutive CSR Roadmap, detailing ambitious objectives for the years 2025 to 2027. Legrand aims to continue its CSR advancements, with a particular focus on sustainability and social responsibility. The North & Central America sector of Legrand is spearheading this initiative, solidifying the company's dedication to creating a more sustainable and socially conscious future through their CSR efforts.

news.headline: Stock market plunges: Dow down 1,400 points on tariffs, small caps in bear market. Tech, private equity hit hard.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a significant sell-off following President Trump's announcement of extensive tariffs. The Dow plunged by a staggering 1,400 points, with small caps showing a bear market decline. Sectors such as tech, banks, private equity, and others were heavily impacted, indicating sell signals. This event highlights the volatile nature of the current market conditions.
